## Description

<!-- Brief description of changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation

## Constitutional Compliance Checklist

- [ ] **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance verified (keyboard nav, screen reader, contrast, alt text)
- [ ] **Privacy**: No PII logged; consent collected before data processing; deletion supported
- [ ] **Security**: Input validated; no secrets exposed; rate limiting in place
- [ ] **Type Safety**: All new code is strictly typed; no `any` usage without justification
- [ ] **Ethical UX**: No dark patterns; finite feeds; no nudge behavior
- [ ] **Modularity**: Changes scoped to appropriate package; no cross-package internal imports
- [ ] **Community Standards**: Conventional commit messages; no discriminatory logic

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated (if UI changes)
- [ ] All existing tests pass
